findings.summary: 4 focus stop(s) have a visible indicator that does not meet the AAA Focus Appearance bar (>= 2px-perimeter area and >= 3:1 contrast). Informative only. e.g. #root > div > div:nth-of-type(1) > button (contrast 3.15), #root > div > div:nth-of-type(2) > button (contrast 1.82), #root > div > div:nth-of-type(3) > button (contrast 1.65), #root > div > div:nth-of-type(1) > button (contrast 3.15)
findings.persona_impact: The focus indicator is present but may be hard to perceive for low-vision users.
